author: @anglerandy5736
text: I want to make an amphibious electric mountainboard/kayak. Can you do it first so I have a video tutorial?!

author: @rickparker8036
text: Fantastic job! Well done young man… Well done! What did you think your top speed was?

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Thank you so much mate! I think it was around 8-10mph, but it gets there nice and quick. I should really buy a speedo for this stuff LOL. :)

author: @richardgregory4640
text: I'm not sure I understand why you've used an intermediate drive cog instead of just driving the rear wheel directly or via a belt?

author: @thelement3363
text: Mister wizard meets MacGyver. Your channel is to me like merlin in sword and the stone.

author: @nickhadziannis8451
text: aWSOME!

author: @deanc6539
text: Have you thought about steering with the back wheel and having the front two fixed? It could make the trike a bit more nimble, but I'm sure it would complicate things. Interested? Up for a challenge?

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: That does sound like fun, an awesome idea mate! I will definitely think about it, Cheers mate! :)

author: @serfer4219
text: nice work, was that top speed?

author: @WazzyCabbage
text: good to see young enthusiasts not deterred, well done !!!

author: @docink6175
text: Showing it's speed would have been nice, if you put all that work into it and it barely does a fast walking pace I don't see much point in it

author: @IgorAlvesAS
text: "Noice.... Noice..." HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

author: @truthseeker3907
text: Good Job Luke and Thumbs up! 👍

author: @angelusmendez5084
text: Awesome! 👏

author: @ProlificInvention
text: Great video guys, love what you do.  That drive system is great, and your enthusiasm is a breath of fresh air.

author: @wildfire8341
text: His got the force .. well done Luke  super excited

author: @colleenforrest7936
text: Love it!

author: @peters7413
text: The success criteria on this channel is .... if it works for 1 min or 20 meters it is "absolutely incredible " 😑

replies.author: @Kezat
replies.text: A functional prototype is 1000X better then none at all :)

replies.author: @peters7413
replies.text:
@Kezat yes you are right....but I think I would be nice with more details in the videos, they orffen talks like we know the same as the do....I don't. ...therefore I am left with more questions then answers 😊
And more camaras angels would be super nice to see ☺

author: @MarioAbbruscato
text: Luke, the force flows mightily in you :)  Really Fantastic!

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: LOL! Thank you so much, mate! :)

author: @Ianochez
text: the resulting speed of that thing wasn't that I... expected ahah but still, it's totally awesome!

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Thank you mate! It definitely surprised me, around 8-10mph which I'm really happy with lol. Thanks mate! :)

author: @dr_ned_flanders
text: Good job Luke

author: @stevetobias4890
text: Cool Luke, will the drive wheel chew the tyre tread?

text: This looks fantastic
